summary_oneline: Extract parrot/outputs/formats to ai-parrot-visualizations using PEP 420 namespace merging (same pattern as ai-parrot-embeddings)

Stays in core; uses registry via get_renderer

constraints.claim: OutputMode enum is central and CANNOT move
OutputFormatter stays in core (orchestrator in bots/abstract.py:477)

card.py, slack.py, whatsapp.py, jinja2.py, template_report.py, markdown.py to satellite
